title: Friday Sermon 16 April 1993
description:
The text http://www.alislam.org/urdu/sermon/FST19930416-UR.pdf

This Friday Sermon was followed by the Nikah ceremony of Hazrat Khalifatul Masih's daughter Syeda Yasmine Rehman Mona with Karim Asad Ahmad Khan.  The audio recording of this announcement can be heard at https://archive.org/details/Nikmp3cut.net
